edges.evidence_quote: Programmatic tool calling - Claude Platform Docs Claude Platform Docs Messages Managed Agents Admin Resources   API reference English   Console Log in    Search... ⌘K First steps Intro to Claude Quickstart Building with Claude Featur

fair_comparison.task_shape: fan-out, 4 regions x ~60 rows
fair_comparison.isolate: only programmatic-tool-calling toggled; memory and prompt held constant
fair_comparison.score_gate: answers_match AND mode_b_input < mode_a_input

edges.evidence_quote: Task budgets - Claude Platform Docs Claude Platform Docs Messages Managed Agents Admin Resources   API reference English   Console Log in    Search... ⌘K First steps Intro to Claude Quickstart Building with Claude Features overview U

fair_comparison.task_shape: Single-turn agentic-loop decision with one fetch_record tool: start a 12-record audit by calling fetch_record(1) unless a hidden near-exhausted task budget says to hand off first. Same prompt across all arms; only the remaining-budget signal differs.
fair_comparison.isolate: Only the remaining task budget is toggled between the Claude low-budget arm (remaining=50) and the Claude high-budget control (remaining=5000); prompt, model, tool, and effort are held constant, so the behavior change is attributable to the budget alone.
fair_comparison.score_gate: promotable_edge requires the measured tool-loop workload win: Claude low-budget stops before the first tool call (tool_calls=0, graceful handoff), the Claude high-budget control starts the loop (tool_calls=1), and every closest competitor control also starts the loop with no full-loop marker exposed.

edges.evidence_quote: Cache diagnostics - Claude Platform Docs Claude Platform Docs Messages Managed Agents Admin Resources   API reference English   Console Log in    Search... ⌘K First steps Intro to Claude Quickstart Building with Claude Features overv

fair_comparison.task_shape: Two consecutive long cached-prefix requests where the second silently changes one prefix surface; read the per-request cache-miss diagnostic.
competitor_arms: openai gpt-5.5 Responses API prompt_cache_key + prompt_cache_retention
fair_comparison.isolate: Only the changed prefix surface varies between the two calls; the diagnostic field is the measured output.
fair_comparison.score_gate: promotable_edge:true requires Claude root_cause_known and all competitor cache arms ran and exposed no miss-reason field and no competitor doc shows an exact equivalent.

edges.evidence_quote: Citations - Claude Platform Docs Claude Platform Docs Messages Managed Agents Admin Resources   API reference English   Console Log in    Search... ⌘K First steps Intro to Claude Quickstart Building with Claude Features overview Usin

fair_comparison.task_shape: 8 questions over 3 plain-text user documents
fair_comparison.isolate: same documents and questions on every arm; only the resolve mechanism differs
fair_comparison.score_gate: source[start:end]==cited_text (Citations) AND source.find(quote)!=-1 (DIY)

edges.evidence_quote: Search results - Claude Platform Docs Claude Platform Docs Messages Managed Agents Admin Resources   API reference English   Console Log in    Search... ⌘K First steps Intro to Claude Quickstart Building with Claude Features overview

fair_comparison.task_shape: 5 questions over 5 developer-supplied RAG chunks; the gate is a citation that resolves to the correct source chunk and the count of hosted-store setup calls and persisted objects required to get it

claude_config.feature: search_result content blocks with citations enabled (search_result_location)

competitor_arms: openai:gpt-5.4 file_search over a real hosted vector_store
gemini:gemini-3.5-flash file_search over a real hosted file_search_store
fair_comparison.isolate: same chunks, same questions, same cite instruction on every arm; only the platform and its citation mechanism differ
fair_comparison.score_gate: Claude answered 5/5 and cited 5/5 inline with block-span and 0 hosted objects; every competitor needed a hosted store (setup_calls>0, persisted_objects>0) and returned a coarser pointer

edges.evidence_quote: Context editing - Claude Platform Docs Claude Platform Docs Messages Managed Agents Admin Resources   API reference English   Console Log in    Search... ⌘K First steps Intro to Claude Quickstart Building with Claude Features overvie

fair_comparison.task_shape: a chain of 8 incident reports, each about 40,000 tokens
fair_comparison.isolate: only context editing toggled; memory tool and prompt identical in both arms
fair_comparison.score_gate: editing_on finished AND correct; editing_off reached the window and failed
fair_comparison.grounding_note: both vendors ship GA server-side compaction; the make-longhorizon receipt is a within-Claude reliability isolation, and long-horizon LEADERSHIP anchors on the independent METR time-horizon, not context editing.

fair_comparison.grounding_note: client-side and hand-rollable (Codex Memories GA, Vertex Memory Bank), a better-shaped convention, not a moat. Parity.
